title: panicum amarum
intro: Panicum amarum, also known as bitter panicgrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae and is native to North America. The medicinal properties of Panicum amarum include its use as a diuretic, an anti-inflammatory, and a treatment for various respiratory issues due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to relieve symptoms of coughs, colds, and sore throats, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. Panicum amarum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs for its medicinal properties.
